fields.label: Channel Name
fields.description: Display name for the distribution channel

fields.label: Channel Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (slug). Example: amazon, shopify, website

fields.label: Channel Type
fields.options:
E-Commerce
Marketplace
Social Commerce
Retail
Wholesale
B2B Portal
Mobile App
Other
fields.description: Type of distribution channel

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this channel

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which channels appear (lower = first)

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Base URL for API integration (e.g., https://api.example.com)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for authentication (stored encrypted)

fields.label: API Secret
fields.description: API secret for authentication (stored encrypted)

fields.label: Webhook URL
fields.description: URL for receiving webhooks from this channel (auto-generated)

fields.label: Default Export Format
fields.description: Default format for product data exports

fields.label: Export Language
fields.description: Default language for exported product data

fields.label: Export Currency
fields.description: Currency for price exports

fields.label: Include Variants
fields.description: Include product variants in exports

fields.label: Include Media
fields.description: Include product images and media in exports

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.description: Direction of data synchronization

fields.label: Auto Sync
fields.description: Automatically sync changes to this channel

fields.label: Sync Interval
fields.description: How often to sync data automatically

fields.label: Last Sync
fields.description: Timestamp of last synchronization

fields.label: Connection Status
fields.options:
Not Configured
Connected
Connection Failed
Authentication Error
fields.description: Current connection status

fields.label: Last Connection Check
fields.description: When the connection was last verified

fields.label: Error Message
fields.description: Last error message if connection failed

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description and notes about this channel
